ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Instead of managing it internally, Admonitions will maintain a CSS snippet to enable your custom types for callouts.
ast.target: Instead of managing it internally, Admonitions will maintain a CSS snippet to enable your custom types for callouts.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a new Admonition type. All custom Admonitions will also be usable as callouts.
ast.target: Add a new Admonition type. All custom Admonitions will also be usable as callouts.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: Collapsible admonitions & callouts will be either opened or closed.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: Any admonition that does not have content inside it will be hidden.

ast.target: Obsidian 0.14 has introduced Callout boxes to its core functionality using the same syntax as the Microsoft Document callouts.

ast.target: This has rendered the Microsoft Document syntax for Admonitions obsolete, but Admonitions can still be used to create and manage your custom callout types.
